user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused (gamePhase === "PAUSED"), the UI rendering function doesn't handle this state, causing the HUD to disappear. The human wants the HUD to remain visible during pause, without any overlay or pause text.

- Files affected: ui.js

- Changes needed: Modify the renderUI() function to render the HUD, objective, and mystery effects when the game is in PAUSED state, treating it the same as PLAYING state for rendering purposes. This will keep the HUD visible without adding any gray overlay or pause messages.
